full_text:
Xing Zhen 邢貞
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xing Zhen (邢貞). Quarrelled with Cheng Yu and later got rebuked by Wu officers when he was envoy. Xing Zhen was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
